1.premise: Flying can mean getting high rather than traveling.
Being funny privately does not mean being funny onstage.
Crowd work fails in a minute if audiences think too slowly.
Comedy shows become reality avoidance after ignored Epstein news.
Self-belief in funniness may not reach the room.

lines.text: On a blunt, I'm from Austin, I'm in Austin.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: So basically what happened was I didn't plan to be here and then now I'm here.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: So this guy told me not to say his name on stage, Jimmy Prescott, and he invited me
lines.label: setup

lines.text: because he said that sometimes I'm funny, but only when people aren't around.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Usually I do crowd work, but that's found upon when there's only 60 seconds,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So, 'cause y'all take too long to think.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: But I think it's kind of crazy that the Epstein files dropped
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and everybody just sort of like, cool, yeah.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: We're not gonna do anything about it.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: We all know what's going on and we're just gonna, woo.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So anyway, that's why y'all are here.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: You're avoiding reality and that's why I'm here.
lines.label: tag
